_comment: Stub Storyline Threads for Wave 2 (Sprint 10). Replace with live storylines DB query when that sprint ships.

featured.title: After the Bracket: Three Conversations
featured.latest_chapter_dek: Where the bottom third of the sport is right now, and why it is the most interesting room in college football.
featured.thread_summary: Tracing how the 12-team era reshaped fan-voice posture across the sport's three tiers — from the loud-anxious top to the patient middle to the quiet bottom.
